Target
Target language
Fallback language
The page language needs to be aligned with the app language. If the app language is not in the scope of the campaign (page language + target language), the fallback language will be displayed.
Please select the target language and fallback language.
Text polishing
The LLM is still under optimization. Please manually review the polished text before use. Avoid "||||", "%s" and "<...>"three symbols, otherwise the polishing will fail. Check the SOP for more details.

    Configuration guide
    Registration activities support multi-page configuration and efficient configuration process. It is recommended to refer to the following steps.
    Edit gameplay page

    Configure the gameplay page first. Currently, no registration gameplay is configured.

    Generate registration page

    Generate based on components on gameplay page

    Configure dynamic banner

    Configure a dynamic banner for the core component to attract users

    Campaign reward usage
    Sufficient

    Configure page

    Click the grey blank area in the canvas to return to the configuration of the page's general information
    Basic information
    *
    Page title will be used for the wallet reward details and the inbox message. Please use the real campaign name that is readable by the LIVE creators/viewers.
    *
    Risk control
    Campaign Statistic Limit Configuration
    *
    If you choose to configure the statistical upper limit of LIVE duration, the overall data of the campaign will only count the behavior data of the creators within the LIVE duration, and the excess will not be counted. Please clearly display the campaign rules on the campaign page

    Configure page

    Click the grey blank area in the canvas to return to the configuration of the page's general information
    Basic information
    *
    Page title will be used for the wallet reward details and the inbox message. Please use the real campaign name that is readable by the LIVE creators/viewers.
    *
    Risk control
    Campaign Statistic Limit Configuration
    *
    If you choose to configure the statistical upper limit of LIVE duration, the overall data of the campaign will only count the behavior data of the creators within the LIVE duration, and the excess will not be counted. Please clearly display the campaign rules on the campaign page
